textPlain: It's an SBC-scale OXCO. I half wonder if adding a larger heatsink, or even putting thermal mass around the existing oscillator could also help, or if the heating is more localized in the PCB itself.Always fun new things to learn when doing something "simple" like setting up an NTP server!
It's the good old OCXO - Oven Controlled Crystal Oscillator. But the heating element is the CPU. Fucking hilarious.
